# TickTick Pixel H5

Static H5 reconstruction of a TickTick desktop month-calendar plus task-list workbench used for the `ticktick-pixel-h5` change.

## What It Shows

- Left month calendar / schedule surface
- Right task list workspace
- Inbox-first capture that never auto-places unscheduled items into calendar blocks

## Open It

Open `index.html` directly in a browser or serve the repository root with any static server during this test.
